name: PCCOOLER CPS C3 T500 ARGB PC Case, Dual-Chamber Mid-Tower ATX Case, Desktop Computer Case w/ 6 ARGB Fans Pre-installed w/ Fan Hub, Column-Free Design, Tempered Glass, USB 3.1 Gen 2 Type-C, White and PCCOOLER CPS KN650 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 650W PSU, Native 12V-2x6 Connector, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, Dual CPU Power Cables, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, P3-KN650-G1F
shortName: PCCOOLER CPS C3 T500 ARGB PC Case, Dual-Chamber Mid-Tower ATX Case
description: Bundle featuring a dual-chamber mid-tower ATX case with 6 ARGB fans and a 650W 80+ Gold fully modular power supply for mid-range PC builds.
